name: WISCONSIN ELECTRIC POWER CO
summary: Wisconsin Electric Power Company (WE) is a regulated utility providing electric and natural gas service. It operates electric generation facilities including coal, natural gas combustion turbines, reciprocating engines, biomass, solar, wind, and battery storage assets. WE also distributes natural gas through local distribution infrastructure. The company operates under the WEC Energy Group corporate umbrella and is regulated by the PSCW and FERC.

products.name: Electric Generation and Distribution
products.description: Generation and delivery of electricity using coal, natural gas, solar, wind, biomass, and battery storage facilities.

products.name: Natural Gas Distribution
products.description: Local distribution of natural gas to residential, commercial, and industrial customers.

products.name: Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG)
products.description: Storage and supply of LNG for peak demand and backup natural gas supply needs.

partnerships.description: Affiliated transmission company involved in electric transmission infrastructure.
Affiliated shared services entity providing business support services to WE and affiliates.
Affiliated entity involved in power plant ownership related to WE operations.
Regional transmission organization managing energy and operating reserves markets for WE.
